subcodes.title: Words to the Master's entourage, spoken on 1913-03-10
subcodes.first_line: These objections are always raised against the truth but the truth will march toward its ultimate goal of triumph. When we were exiled from Teheran to Bagdad
subcodes.subjects: @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @growth of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution
